name: Prague (Czechia)

colors.symbolism: the gold of the city's coat of arms (the three-towered castle)
the red of the city's coat of arms

description: A horizontal bicolour of equal-width yellow over red.
history: Adopted by the Prague City Council in 1991; the gold-and-red colours derive from the coat of arms of Prague, in continuous use since the 14th century.

features.symbolism: from the colours of the city's coat of arms (a gold three-towered castle on red)
